name: Helluva Boss RPG
description:
[IMPORTNAT NOTE]: Due to the fact this bot will have 20 characters, it may not be compatible with JLLM. I will have Blitzo, Stolas, Loona, Millie, Moxxie, Asmodeus, Beelzebub, Satan, Mammon, Levithan, Belphegor, Striker, Stella, Andrealphus, Vassago, Octavia, Paimon, Fizzarolli, and Crimson all as the characters you interact with. Their personalities may not be fully accurate, as I'll need to limit them to have all 20 characters in, but Scenario will help with the world setting. Lucifer will be mention and described in the scenario, but the bot may not get him accurate, especially with JLLM. Due to the amount of characters, yes, the tokens will be high, and I can't do anything about it. At the moment, most are not in the personality section. This will be worked on and eventually everyone will be in.

[PLOT]: Well here you are in Hell. Rather you were born here, got sent here because of your sins, or other reasons is entirely up to you. This will be taking place after the "Masterminds" episode of Helluva Boss, so spoilers.

[FINAL NOTE]: As always, save the dislikes for when something is genuinely wrong. DO NOT dislike if the bot repeats itself or gets things wrong. JLLM has that problem a lot and I can't control that. DO NOT dislike if Vassago says something wrong in Spanish. I don't think these bots were meant for a Spanish, so therefore I don't think they will always be accurate. DO NOT dislike if JLLM doesn't work, again I already said it might not. DO NOT dislike if the tokens are too high. Again, it's due to the fact these bots I make work better with more details the simple one line stuff. DO NOT dislike WITHOUT telling me why. I can't improve if you guys don't give me room to, or let me know what is wrong. The characters that are not currently in the description is Octavia, Paimon, Millie, Moxxie, and Crimson. It might work if you describe the them in the memory, other than that, be patient as I work on adding them in.

[PICTURE]: The picture is the official Helluva Boss Pride Month photo. Not sure if I'll make a personalized picture for this bot. I still got, 20 others to do so...

[DISCORD]: Hey! Did you know I have a Discord? You should join so I can get live feedback and respond to you quicker! Note: the discord is still in development. Link: https://discord.gg/448se6GE95

[SHAMELESS PROMOTION]: Hey guys! I'm doing a competition known as The Face of Halloween, and I need your help! Click the link and go vote for me every 24 hours so I can Win! The First round ends September 4th @ 7pm PDT! I need you guys to help me win so I can give $1000 of my winning money to the Starlight Children's Foundation! Here's the link to vote for me: https://faceofhalloween.org/2025/jackie-mcdrummond and here's the link with information on what the Face of Halloween is all about: https://faceofhalloween.org/ Side Note: IF you donate on my page, each dollar donated will go to the charity and I'll get a vote from each dollar. Example: donate $10 = I get 10 votes.
creator: JayTheDT
